caption: A screen recording displays a computer terminal window running on a Linux-based system. The window shows a continuous stream of server log files scrolling rapidly in white text against a black background. Legible entries include repeated requests such as "GET /sitemap.xml HTTP/1.0" and references to "ravengate HTTP/1.0" and "WordPress," interspersed with system paths like "/var/log/syslog." The top of the window shows a menu bar with "Activities," "Terminal," and the date "Oct 28 00:21." At the bottom of the interface, a status bar contains the text "e-bash" and "utf-8." As the sequence progresses, the text scrolls upward, replacing old log entries with new ones in real-time, indicating active system monitoring or a security audit. The visual remains consistent in its layout and color scheme, with only the specific lines of code and timestamps changing as the logs update.
